zh.lifeSummary: 當Beatrice Malet於1045年出生在法國豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利格拉維爾時，她的父親William I Malet23歲，母親Esilia Crispin23歲。她和Guillaume d'Arques至少有4個兒子和4個女兒。她去世於1144年在英國林可爾史爾斯伯丁享年99歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Beatrice Malet于1045年出生在法国豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利格拉維爾时，她的父亲William I Malet23岁，母亲Esilia Crispin23岁。她和Guillaume d'Arques至少有4个儿子和4个女儿。她去世于1144年在英国林可爾史爾斯伯丁享年99岁。

nameMeanings.name: Malet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: nickname from a diminutive of Mal ‘bad’ or from a derivative of the related Old French word maleit ‘accursed’ (see Mallet 1). Compare Malette .
French: from the Old French personal name Malet, a pet form of Malo (compare Mallet 2).

variants.name: Mal
meanings: Slovenian: nickname for a physically small man, from mal ‘small, little’.

variants.name: Malette
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Gaston, Alphonse, Francois, Jacques, Rejean, Serge.
French: variant or feminine form of Malet and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this, reflecting the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.

nameMeanings.name: Beatrice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and French form of   Beatrix  , which was quite popular in England during the Middle Ages, and strongly revived in the 19th century. It is most famous as the name of Dante's beloved, and is borne by the elder (  b. 1988 ) of the Duke of York's daughters.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Beatrice Malet was born in 1045, in Graville, Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy, France, her father, William I Malet, was 23 and her mother, Esilia Crispin, was 23. She had at least 4 sons and 4 daughters with Guillaume d'Arques. She died in 1144, in Spalding, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 99.

Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles avec Guillaume d'Arques. Elle est décédée en 1144, à Spalding, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 99 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Beatrice Malet 1045 in Graville, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William I Malet 23 und ihre Mutter Esilia Crispin 23. Sie hatte mit Guillaume d'Arques mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1144 im Alter von 99 Jahren in Spalding, Lincolnshire, England.

Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie con Guillaume d'Arques. Morì nel 1144, nel Spalding, Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 99 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Beatrice Maletが1045年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメグラヴィルで生まれた時，父William I Maletは23歳，母Esilia Crispinは23歳であった。彼女はGuillaume d'Arquesとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1144年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスプアルディングで99歳で死去した。

ko.Thorpe Arche, Yorkshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 소 인 로스웰
ko.lifeSummary: Beatrice Malet(이)가 1045년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 세이인-마이팀 그래빌에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William I Malet(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Esilia Crispin(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 Guillaume d'Arques(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1144년 영국 링코실르 스팔딩에서 99세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Beatrice Malet родилась в 1045 г. в местности гравилл, сине-маритим, хауте-норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени William I Malet было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Esilia Crispin, 23. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери от Guillaume d'Arques. Она умерла в 1144 г. в местности спалдинг, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 99 лет.
